name: Himalaya Purifying Neem Face Wash
description: Gentle daily face wash with neem and turmeric extracts that purifies skin and prevents pimples. Suitable for oily and combination skin. Dermatologically tested.

name: Lakme Enrich Matte Lipstick
description: Long-lasting matte lipstick enriched with Vitamin E for smooth comfortable wear. Available in shades suited for Indian skin tones. Stays up to 8 hours.

name: Maybelline Colossal Kajal
description: Intense black kajal with 12-hour stay formula and smudge-proof finish. Gives bold dramatic eyes with a single stroke. Enriched with almond oil for smooth application.

name: Lakme 9to5 Primer + Matte Foundation
description: 2-in-1 foundation with built-in primer for flawless long-lasting coverage. Oil-free lightweight formula for Indian skin tones. Provides up to 16-hour matte finish.

name: Engage W1 Perfume for Women
description: Floral-fruity fragrance crafted for the modern Indian woman. Long-lasting scent that stays fresh for 8+ hours. Perfect for everyday use and special occasions.

name: Lakme Absolute Makeup Kit
description: Complete all-in-one makeup kit including foundation, blush, eye shadow palette, lipstick, and mascara. Ideal for beginners and professionals. Comes in a premium vanity box.

name: Parachute Advansed Jasmine Hair Oil
description: Enriched with jasmine extracts and pure coconut oil for soft, shiny, and strong hair. Non-sticky lightweight formula ideal for daily use. Reduces hair fall and adds fragrance.

name: Dove Intense Repair Shampoo
description: Specially formulated for damaged hair, deeply nourishes and repairs from within. Keratin Actives technology for smooth, strong, and healthy-looking hair. Suitable for all hair types.

name: TRESemmé Smooth & Shine Conditioner
description: Salon-quality conditioner that instantly detangles and smoothens frizzy hair. Enriched with vitamin H and silk proteins for sleek manageable hair. Use after shampoo for best results.

name: Livon Hair Serum
description: Lightweight leave-in serum that controls frizz and adds instant shine. Works on wet and dry hair for smooth silky finish. A few drops enough for all-day glossy hair.

name: Stayfree Secure Sanitary Pads
description: Ultra-thin pads with dry-weave top sheet that locks moisture and keeps skin dry. Anti-leak side wings for extra protection. Available in regular, XL, and overnight sizes.

name: Dove Cream Beauty Bathing Bar
description: Contains 1/4 moisturizing cream that nourishes skin while cleansing. Gentle on sensitive skin and leaves skin soft and smooth. Ideal for daily use in all seasons.

name: Nivea Women Fresh Active Deodorant
description: 48-hour protection deodorant with fresh floral fragrance. Alcohol-free formula gentle on skin. Keeps you fresh and confident throughout the day.

name: Gold-Plated Jhumka Earrings
description: Elegant gold-plated jhumka earrings with traditional Indian design. Made with high-quality brass base and anti-tarnish coating. Perfect for casual wear, festivals, and functions.

name: Glass Bangle Set Multicolor (12 pcs)
description: Vibrant set of 12 glass bangles in assorted festive colors. Traditional Indian bangle set ideal for weddings, Navratri, Karwachauth, and all celebrations.
